result:
Job 3C is complete. All deliverables are in `jobs/landing-c/`: `index.html` (62KB, self-contained except `assets/`), `RATIONALE.md`, `proof-desktop.png` (1440×13204 full page), and `proof-mobile.png` (390×15041 full page).

**What was built.** The full nine-section messaging rack rendered as the "Editorial Practice" permutation: a split editorial hero where the runner/surfer photos cross-fade on a slow 9-second cadence with a ken-burns settle; the capability curve as a white-plate inline figure that draws itself once into view (all six functional bands, both zone labels, the Serious Life Event drop with dashed ghost line, and the bronze lifted trajectory with its Stronger Golden Years marker); the signals as a ruled typographic plate on grid paper; the experience as a four-step alternating stepped reveal with the warm photo set and every rack proof (full Elite panel marker groups, 163-gene/~3-week stats, the eight-name connect wall); six continuous-care modules on navy; the Tuesday voice message as an interactive play-button voice-note card with a 0:47 simulated playback sweeping a waveform; a count-up proof rack with the verbatim source line; the dual-path close with price in the open; and the gradient footer with the oversized wordmark.

**Verified.** Zero em dashes in both files (grep-confirmed), `Log In` header CTA and `Apply for Membership` acquisition CTAs throughout, no `Join` anywhere, dual-path close present, all ten referenced asset paths resolve, and mobile holds at exactly 390px with no horizontal overflow.

**Bugs caught during QA.** Three found in my own first render and fixed: a CSS specificity bug (`#curveSvg` initial states beat the `.drawn` reveal rules, so the curve never drew), clipped band labels at the SVG's left edge, and a mobile horizontal overflow from the fixed-width waveform bars. I also discovered headless Chrome ignores `--window-size=390` for layout, so the mobile proof renders through a 390px iframe wrapper.

**Notable judgment calls** (full detail in RATIONALE.md): the rack's slider trio was omitted because the brief explicitly mandates "single elegant draw, not scrollytelling," and where the rack's mechanism notes conflicted with this permutation's brief, the brief won; the connect wall is typographic because sources only contain six of the eight device marks. Open questions flagged: the Log In destination URL and whether Apply should point somewhere better than the `apply@aleronmd.com` mailto.
